room.caption: [NightmareF6] Why are there so many foes called Nightmare?

instance.creationCode:
GID_SET(344050, self.id) bShowArrow=true exitType=0 newMapX=168 newMapY=288 toRoom=rExtGateF_1 newDraw=1 image_blend=c_maroon
var instrProg; instrProg=string_char_at(global.eGateProg,6) if instrProg="8" {instance_destroy()}
